name: AGFRC Programmable Software
description: Configure AGFRC programmable servos via the AGF-SP USB program card.

version_check.pattern: AGFRC Programmable Software V([\d.]+) for USB Programmer AGF-SPV4

notes: Bare portable exe (AGF-SP V4 build) - no installer, run directly. AGFRC serves it under an opaque hashed filename that changes when re-uploaded, so both the download URL and exe_relative_path rot together (the single-exe scan still resolves the launcher). A separate legacy build exists for the older AGF-SPV2 card.
